description.value: Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Used for rolling to hit when fighting in ranged or melee combat, in place of any other skills. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling checks involving feats of physicality, including athletics and evasion. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling when making checks that require training or finesse. Note: if the task is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers accordingly. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
A heavy SMG. Due to its size it can't be concealed.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
Standard Kevlar for your head. No armor penalty.
Bomb vest. Stay clear of the splash zone.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 3/Rank-And-File - Low-level but accredited members of NC's various groups, with enough authority to wear the org's colors but not enough to pose a real threat on their own.

Gang-Wide Ability - Martyr: At the start of each initiative round, you may choose one Reckoner to martyr. The reckoner immediately detonates a vest of cheap plastic explosives, killing themselves instantly. Treat this explosion as the detonation of an armor-piercing rocket, centered on the Reckoner.

Extra Gear - Each Reckoner is equipped with a heavy melee weapon. They can also be equipped with either a heavy pistol or heavy SMG, and 2 magazines of incendiary ammunition.

Ability - Jinx: As their turn action, a Reckoner can inflict harm to themself while concentrating on an individual that they can see, such as attacking themselves, poisoning themselves, or purposefully missing a shot or jamming their weapon. When they do, they make a ranged attack against their target using pistol DVs which the target may not dodge but which does no damage. If hit, the next time their target takes damage, that misfortune befalls them to the exact same effect/damage/etc. This effect expires if the martyr is killed, rendered unconscious, chooses to end it, leaves the scene, or after one minute.

Think you’ve seen it all, eh? Well, have I got news for you! There are some things in the world that none of us can explain - not the people responsible, not the people watching, not the victims. Maybe this is one of those times. If it is, then you know God has a twisted sense of humor.
